skills.name: keynote-speaking
skills.description: Information about Will Turner's keynote speaking on Simplexity — topics covered, audience types, formats (45–60 min keynote, workshop, half-day), and how to make an enquiry.

skills.name: executive-coaching
skills.description: Information about Will Turner's 1:1 executive coaching for senior leaders — the penny drop in private. High-value, low-volume engagements.

skills.name: trusted-advisory
skills.description: Information about Will Turner's trusted advisor service — embedded in 2–3 organisations at a time as the person who sees unconscious complexity and says so.

skills.name: simplexity-framework
skills.description: Full explanation of the Simplexity framework — unconscious complexity, the penny drop, and the Simplexity Matrix (Fog, Frozen, Focus, Fluent). Original IP by Will Turner.

skills.name: book-registration
skills.description: Information about Will Turner's forthcoming book — Simplexity: The Simple Truth Inside Everything Complex — arriving Q1 2027. Register interest.

skills.name: contact
skills.description: Contact Will Turner to enquire about keynote speaking, executive coaching, or trusted advisory.
